metadata.title: Bereishis 3:17-3:24 staged reviewed support
notes: This file is a curated staged reviewed-support seed bank for the next contiguous slice.
It is not active runtime content yet; it exists to strengthen future promotion readiness.

questions.question_text: What does אֲרוּרָה mean?
questions.question: What does אֲרוּרָה mean?
questions.explanation: אֲרוּרָה means 'cursed'.
questions.pasuk: וּלְאָדָם אָמַר, כִּי־שָׁמַעְתָּ לְקוֹל אִשְׁתֶּךָ, וַתֹּאכַל, מִן־הָעֵץ, אֲשֶׁר צִוִּיתִיךָ לֵאמֹר, לֹא תֹאכַל מִמֶּנּוּ; אֲרוּרָה הָאֲדָמָה, בַּעֲבוּרֶךָ, בְּעִצָּבוֹן, תֹּאכֲלֶנָּה, כֹּל יְמֵי חַיֶּיךָ.

questions.question_text: What does עֵשֶׂב mean?
questions.question: What does עֵשֶׂב mean?
questions.explanation: עֵשֶׂב means 'grass'.
questions.pasuk: וְקוֹץ וְדַרְדַּר, תַּצְמִיחַ לָךְ; וְאָכַלְתָּ, אֶת־עֵשֶׂב הַשָּׂדֶה.

questions.question_text: What does לֶחֶם mean?
questions.question: What does לֶחֶם mean?
questions.explanation: לֶחֶם means 'bread'.
questions.pasuk: בְּזֵעַת אַפֶּיךָ, תֹּאכַל לֶחֶם, עַד שׁוּבְךָ, אֶל־הָאֲדָמָה: כִּי מִמֶּנָּה לֻקָּחְתָּ, כִּי־עָפָר אַתָּה, וְאֶל־עָפָר תָּשׁוּב.

questions.question_text: What does חָי mean?
questions.question: What does חָי mean?
questions.explanation: חָי means 'living'.
questions.pasuk: וַיִּקְרָא הָאָדָם, שֵׁם אִשְׁתּוֹ חַוָּה: כִּי הִוא הָיְתָה, אֵם כָּל־חָי.

questions.question_text: What does כָּתְנוֹת mean?
questions.question: What does כָּתְנוֹת mean?
questions.explanation: כָּתְנוֹת means 'garments'.
questions.pasuk: וַיַּעַשׂ יְהוָה אֱלֹהִים, לְאָדָם וּלְאִשְׁתּוֹ, כָּתְנוֹת עוֹר; וַיַּלְבִּשֵׁם.

questions.question_text: What does יִשְׁלַח mean?
questions.question: What does יִשְׁלַח mean?
questions.explanation: יִשְׁלַח means 'he will stretch out'.
questions.pasuk: וַיֹּאמֶר יְהוָה אֱלֹהִים, הֵן הָאָדָם, הָיָה כְּאַחַד מִמֶּנּוּ, לָדַעַת, טוֹב וָרָע; וְעַתָּה, פֶּן־יִשְׁלַח יָדוֹ, וְלָקַח גַּם מֵעֵץ הַחַיִּים, וְאָכַל, וָחַי לְעֹלָם.

questions.question_text: What does לַעֲבֹד mean?
questions.question: What does לַעֲבֹד mean?
questions.explanation: לַעֲבֹד means 'to work'.
questions.pasuk: וַיְשַׁלְּחֵהוּ יְהוָה אֱלֹהִים, מִגַּן־עֵדֶן, לַעֲבֹד אֶת־הָאֲדָמָה, אֲשֶׁר לֻקַּח מִשָּׁם.

questions.question_text: What does דֶּרֶךְ mean?
questions.question: What does דֶּרֶךְ mean?
questions.explanation: דֶּרֶךְ means 'way'.
questions.pasuk: וַיְגָרֶשׁ, אֶת־הָאָדָם; וַיַּשְׁכֵּן מִקֶּדֶם לְגַן־עֵדֶן, אֶת־הַכְּרֻבִים, וְאֵת לַהַט הַחֶרֶב, הַמִּתְהַפֶּכֶת, לִשְׁמֹר, אֶת־דֶּרֶךְ עֵץ הַחַיִּים.

questions.question_text: What is the shoresh of שָׁמַעְתָּ?
questions.question: What is the shoresh of שָׁמַעְתָּ?
questions.explanation: The shoresh of שָׁמַעְתָּ is שמע.
questions.pasuk: וּלְאָדָם אָמַר, כִּי־שָׁמַעְתָּ לְקוֹל אִשְׁתֶּךָ, וַתֹּאכַל, מִן־הָעֵץ, אֲשֶׁר צִוִּיתִיךָ לֵאמֹר, לֹא תֹאכַל מִמֶּנּוּ; אֲרוּרָה הָאֲדָמָה, בַּעֲבוּרֶךָ, בְּעִצָּבוֹן, תֹּאכֲלֶנָּה, כֹּל יְמֵי חַיֶּיךָ.

questions.explanation: The shoresh of תָּשׁוּב is שוב.

questions.explanation: The shoresh of וַיַּלְבִּשֵׁם is לבש.

questions.question_text: What does the prefix ל mean in לְקוֹל?
questions.question: What does the prefix ל mean in לְקוֹל?
questions.explanation: In לְקוֹל, the prefix ל means 'to / for'.
questions.pasuk: וּלְאָדָם אָמַר, כִּי־שָׁמַעְתָּ לְקוֹל אִשְׁתֶּךָ, וַתֹּאכַל, מִן־הָעֵץ, אֲשֶׁר צִוִּיתִיךָ לֵאמֹר, לֹא תֹאכַל מִמֶּנּוּ; אֲרוּרָה הָאֲדָמָה, בַּעֲבוּרֶךָ, בְּעִצָּבוֹן, תֹּאכֲלֶנָּה, כֹּל יְמֵי חַיֶּיךָ.

questions.question: What does the suffix ו mean in יָדוֹ?
questions.explanation: In יָדוֹ, the suffix ו means 'his'.
questions.pasuk: וַיֹּאמֶר יְהוָה אֱלֹהִים, הֵן הָאָדָם, הָיָה כְּאַחַד מִמֶּנּוּ, לָדַעַת, טוֹב וָרָע; וְעַתָּה, פֶּן־יִשְׁלַח יָדוֹ, וְלָקַח גַּם מֵעֵץ הַחַיִּים, וְאָכַל, וָחַי לְעֹלָם.

questions.question_text: What does this phrase mean?
questions.question: What does this phrase mean?
choices: by the sweat of your brow
because you listened to the voice of your wife
questions.correct_answer: because you listened to the voice of your wife
questions.explanation: Here, כִּי־שָׁמַעְתָּ לְקוֹל אִשְׁתֶּךָ means 'because you listened to the voice of your wife'.
questions.word_gloss: because you listened to the voice of your wife
questions.pasuk: וּלְאָדָם אָמַר, כִּי־שָׁמַעְתָּ לְקוֹל אִשְׁתֶּךָ, וַתֹּאכַל, מִן־הָעֵץ, אֲשֶׁר צִוִּיתִיךָ לֵאמֹר, לֹא תֹאכַל מִמֶּנּוּ; אֲרוּרָה הָאֲדָמָה, בַּעֲבוּרֶךָ, בְּעִצָּבוֹן, תֹּאכֲלֶנָּה, כֹּל יְמֵי חַיֶּיךָ.

questions.question_text: What does this phrase mean?
questions.question: What does this phrase mean?
choices: and by the sweat of your brow
and you shall eat the grass of the field
and because you listened to the voice of your wife
questions.correct_answer: and you shall eat the grass of the field
questions.explanation: Here, וְאָכַלְתָּ אֶת־עֵשֶׂב הַשָּׂדֶה means 'and you shall eat the grass of the field'.
questions.word_gloss: and you shall eat the grass of the field
questions.pasuk: וְקוֹץ וְדַרְדַּר, תַּצְמִיחַ לָךְ; וְאָכַלְתָּ, אֶת־עֵשֶׂב הַשָּׂדֶה.

questions.question_text: What does this phrase mean?
questions.question: What does this phrase mean?
choices: by the sweat of your brow
because you listened to the voice of your wife
questions.correct_answer: by the sweat of your brow
questions.explanation: Here, בְּזֵעַת אַפֶּיךָ means 'by the sweat of your brow'.
questions.word_gloss: by the sweat of your brow
questions.pasuk: בְּזֵעַת אַפֶּיךָ, תֹּאכַל לֶחֶם, עַד שׁוּבְךָ, אֶל־הָאֲדָמָה: כִּי מִמֶּנָּה לֻקָּחְתָּ, כִּי־עָפָר אַתָּה, וְאֶל־עָפָר תָּשׁוּב.

questions.question_text: What does this phrase mean?
questions.question: What does this phrase mean?
choices: by the sweat of your brow
because you listened to the voice of your wife
questions.explanation: Here, אֵם כָּל־חָי means 'mother of all living'.
questions.pasuk: וַיִּקְרָא הָאָדָם, שֵׁם אִשְׁתּוֹ חַוָּה: כִּי הִוא הָיְתָה, אֵם כָּל־חָי.

questions.question_text: What does this phrase mean?
questions.question: What does this phrase mean?
choices: by the sweat of your brow
because you listened to the voice of your wife
questions.explanation: Here, כָּתְנוֹת עוֹר means 'garments of skin'.
questions.pasuk: וַיַּעַשׂ יְהוָה אֱלֹהִים, לְאָדָם וּלְאִשְׁתּוֹ, כָּתְנוֹת עוֹר; וַיַּלְבִּשֵׁם.

questions.question_text: What does this phrase mean?
questions.question: What does this phrase mean?
choices: by the sweat of your brow
because you listened to the voice of your wife
questions.explanation: Here, מֵעֵץ הַחַיִּים means 'from the tree of life'.
questions.pasuk: וַיֹּאמֶר יְהוָה אֱלֹהִים, הֵן הָאָדָם, הָיָה כְּאַחַד מִמֶּנּוּ, לָדַעַת, טוֹב וָרָע; וְעַתָּה, פֶּן־יִשְׁלַח יָדוֹ, וְלָקַח גַּם מֵעֵץ הַחַיִּים, וְאָכַל, וָחַי לְעֹלָם.

questions.question_text: What does this phrase mean?
questions.question: What does this phrase mean?
choices: because you listened to the voice of your wife
by the sweat of your brow
questions.explanation: Here, מִגַּן־עֵדֶן means 'from the Garden of Eden'.
questions.pasuk: וַיְשַׁלְּחֵהוּ יְהוָה אֱלֹהִים, מִגַּן־עֵדֶן, לַעֲבֹד אֶת־הָאֲדָמָה, אֲשֶׁר לֻקַּח מִשָּׁם.

questions.question_text: What does this phrase mean?
questions.question: What does this phrase mean?
choices: because you listened to the voice of your wife
to guard the way to the tree of life
by the sweat of your brow
questions.correct_answer: to guard the way to the tree of life
questions.explanation: Here, לִשְׁמֹר אֶת־דֶּרֶךְ עֵץ הַחַיִּים means 'to guard the way to the tree of life'.
questions.word_gloss: to guard the way to the tree of life
questions.pasuk: וַיְגָרֶשׁ, אֶת־הָאָדָם; וַיַּשְׁכֵּן מִקֶּדֶם לְגַן־עֵדֶן, אֶת־הַכְּרֻבִים, וְאֵת לַהַט הַחֶרֶב, הַמִּתְהַפֶּכֶת, לִשְׁמֹר, אֶת־דֶּרֶךְ עֵץ הַחַיִּים.

questions.question_text: Who is doing the action in וַיִּקְרָא?
questions.question: Who is doing the action in וַיִּקְרָא?
questions.explanation: In וַיִּקְרָא, הָאָדָם is doing the action.
questions.pasuk: וַיִּקְרָא הָאָדָם, שֵׁם אִשְׁתּוֹ חַוָּה: כִּי הִוא הָיְתָה, אֵם כָּל־חָי.

questions.question_text: Who is doing the action in הָיְתָה?
questions.question: Who is doing the action in הָיְתָה?
questions.explanation: In הָיְתָה, הִוא is doing the action.
questions.pasuk: וַיִּקְרָא הָאָדָם, שֵׁם אִשְׁתּוֹ חַוָּה: כִּי הִוא הָיְתָה, אֵם כָּל־חָי.

questions.question_text: Who is doing the action in וַיַּעַשׂ?
questions.question: Who is doing the action in וַיַּעַשׂ?
questions.explanation: In וַיַּעַשׂ, יְהוָה אֱלֹהִים is doing the action.
questions.pasuk: וַיַּעַשׂ יְהוָה אֱלֹהִים, לְאָדָם וּלְאִשְׁתּוֹ, כָּתְנוֹת עוֹר; וַיַּלְבִּשֵׁם.

questions.question_text: Who is doing the action in הָיָה?
questions.question: Who is doing the action in הָיָה?
questions.explanation: In הָיָה, הָאָדָם is doing the action.

questions.question_text: Who is doing the action in וַיְשַׁלְּחֵהוּ?
questions.question: Who is doing the action in וַיְשַׁלְּחֵהוּ?
questions.explanation: In וַיְשַׁלְּחֵהוּ, יְהוָה אֱלֹהִים is doing the action.

questions.question_text: What receives the action in וְאָכַלְתָּ?
questions.question: What receives the action in וְאָכַלְתָּ?
questions.explanation: In וְאָכַלְתָּ, עֵשֶׂב הַשָּׂדֶה is what receives the action.

questions.question_text: What receives the action in תֹּאכַל?

questions.explanation: In תֹּאכַל, לֶחֶם is what receives the action.

questions.question: What receives the action in יִשְׁלַח?
questions.explanation: In יִשְׁלַח, יָדוֹ is what receives the action.
